results.name: James Bond Jr.
results.overview: While attending prep school at Warfield Academy, James Bond Jr. with the help of his friends I.Q. (supposedly the grandson of Q) and Gordo Leiter (supposedly the son of Felix Leiter), fights against the evil terrorist organization SCUM (Saboteurs and Criminals United in Mayhem). Expanding on his uncle's famous line, James Bond Jr.'s catch phrase was "Bond, James Bond. Junior."
Documentary exploring the famous title sequences used in the Bond movies. Narrated by Patrick Macnee. Included on the 'You Only Live Twice' Bluray disc
results.title: Silhouettes: The James Bond Titles

known_for.overview: Meet a diverse group of men, real men across the globe all sharing the same name: James Bond. Australian director Matthew Bauer's energetic exploration of masculine identity features a gay New York theatre director, a Swedish 007 super-fan with a Nazi past, an African American Bond accused of murder, the ornithologist whose name was stolen by author Ian Fleming to name his fictional secret agent, and two resilient women caught up in it all.
known_for.title: The Other Fellow

known_for.overview: A man shows up to a drum audition and puts to shame the other drummer who has better equipment. He gets the gig and plays surfer-style music. Later, the other drummer attacks him and messes him up, but his new girlfriend helps him to regain his drum skills with electricity.
known_for.title: Drum Struck

known_for.overview: Set in a world not unlike mid-20th century America, The Vandal centers on Harold, whose tormented search for peace from traumatic loss results in an unexpectedly destructive awakening after he undergoes a lobotomy. When the procedure “turns his mind inside out” and his great love is suddenly gone, Harold’s desperate search intensifies.
known_for.title: The Vandal

results.overview: An account of the troubled life of Richard Sorge (1895-1944), a Soviet spy of German origin who played a decisive role in the outcome of World War II.
results.title: Stalin's James Bond

results.original_title: Noi non siamo come James Bond
results.overview: How two friends, thanks to the strong relationship between them, piece back together the fragments of their existence sent topsy-turvy by serious illness? Through a peculiar kind of road movie, alternating the dense reflections of the two main characters on life, with their easy positive glances towards the future. Starting from a weird juvenile infatuation with James Bond: he utterly immortal, they extremely mortal. Now more than before.
results.title: We're Nothing Like James Bond

results.original_title: Das geheime Leben des James Bond
results.overview: A journey back to the historical inspirations for 007.
results.title: The Secret Life of James Bond

results.overview: Nani is a trepid and fearful guy who works as a software engineer. Bullet is a mafia don in Dubai. Her mother doesn't know about Bullet's profession. Bullet is forced to come back to India when her mother falls ill. Her mother's last wish is to get Bullet married. That's when Nani falls in love at first sight with Bullet when she visits a temple wearing a traditional dress. Rest of the story is all about what happens when a coward like Nani marries a gangster girl without knowing her real profession.
results.title: James Bond

results.overview: Shinda was mistreated by his relatives therefore he finds other ways to have his love Laali. Shinda and his two other friends come up with a plan to solve all of their problems.
results.title: Jatt James Bond

results.overview: Five friends in hiding after their local business goes bankrupt stumble upon a baby that changes their lives.
results.title: James Bond

results.overview: Fabrizio, a poor thief from the Roman suburbs, finally has in his hands the man who ruined his life: James Bond.
results.title: The Man Who Killed James Bond

results.overview: The events revolve around a three-person gang led by Abu Al-Ghawar (Duraid Lahham), who plans to steal Simon Bay, and the gang members succeed in deceiving him and stealing his locker. Whereas the husband of his sister (Nihad al-Qala'i) is a person who has many problems and disputes with the people of the region due to the mockery of the people of the region of Abu al-Ghawar Who uses this money to do amazing inventions that have no use.
results.title: Ghawar James Bond

results.overview: Charles Louis Schulmeister (1770-1853) was a smuggler and a revolutionary, but also a chief of police and Napoleon Bonaparte's favorite spy. A look back on his adventurous life with the purpose of unraveling the many mysteries of his unique path.
results.title: Napoleon’s James Bond

results.overview: Feature documentary film about the Serbian James Bond, Duško Popov, intelligence agent that inspired the writer Ian Fleming to create the indestructible agent 007.
results.title: James Bond is a Serb

known_for.overview: SUSPICIOUS BOY.  Suspicious doesn’t cut… there is something about this boy, that, just sonst sit right with people. Watch Sussy Boi now.
known_for.title: Sussy Boi

known_for.overview: An evil succubus is preying on libidinous black men in New York, and all that stands in her way is a minister-in-training, an aspiring actor, and a cop that specializes in cases involving the supernatural.
known_for.title: Def by Temptation

known_for.overview: Fraternity and sorority members clash with other students at a historically black college during homecoming weekend.
known_for.title: School Daze

known_for.original_title: Go Tell It on the Mountain
known_for.overview: This film adaptation of James Baldwin's celebrated novel tells the journey of a family from the rural South to "big city" Harlem seeking both salvation and understanding and of a young boy struggling to earn the approval of a self-righteous and often unloving stepfather.
known_for.title: Go Tell It on the Mountain

known_for.overview: Meet a diverse group of men, real men across the globe all sharing the same name: James Bond. Australian director Matthew Bauer's energetic exploration of masculine identity features a gay New York theatre director, a Swedish 007 super-fan with a Nazi past, an African American Bond accused of murder, the ornithologist whose name was stolen by author Ian Fleming to name his fictional secret agent, and two resilient women caught up in it all.
known_for.title: The Other Fellow

known_for.overview: Two dangerous and unwanted guests threaten a young woman and her overbearing mother at a small bed-and-breakfast near the U.S.-Mexico border.
known_for.title: Coyote Lake

known_for.overview: Meet a diverse group of men, real men across the globe all sharing the same name: James Bond. Australian director Matthew Bauer's energetic exploration of masculine identity features a gay New York theatre director, a Swedish 007 super-fan with a Nazi past, an African American Bond accused of murder, the ornithologist whose name was stolen by author Ian Fleming to name his fictional secret agent, and two resilient women caught up in it all.
known_for.title: The Other Fellow
